ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "orderable_device" TEXT /* Orderable device identifier */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the device (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "package_type" TEXT /* Type of package for the device */,
  "package_drawing" TEXT /* Drawing reference for the package */,
  "pins" INTEGER /* Number of pins on the device */,
  "package_qty" INTEGER /* Quantity of devices per package */,
  "eco_plan" TEXT /* Environmental plan associated with the device */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the device */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the device */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the device */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the device was added to the inventory */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the device record */,
  "lead_finish" TEXT /* Material used for the lead finish (e.g., Tin, Silver) */,
  "ball_finish" TEXT /* Material used for the ball finish (e.g., Gold, Copper) */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Storage conditions required for the device */,
  "rohs_compliant" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the device is RoHS compliant */,
  "halogen_free" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the device is halogen-free */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_specs" (
  "temp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for temperature specs */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device */,
  "msl_peak_temp" TEXT /* Moisture sensitivity level peak temperature */,
  "operating_temp" TEXT /* Operating temperature range in Celsius */,
  "storage_temp" TEXT /* Storage temperature range in Celsius */,
  "reliability_test_temp" TEXT /* Temperature range for reliability testing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("temp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_specs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markings" (
  "marking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for top-side markings */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device */,
  "top_side_markings" TEXT /* Markings present on the top side of the device */,
  "bottom_side_markings" TEXT /* Markings present on the bottom side of the device */,
  "side_markings" TEXT /* Markings present on the side of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_markings_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the manufacturer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the supplier */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Engineer, Procurement Specialist, Warehouse Manager) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user-role relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
